title: Slam dunk for Saeima deputies over Baltic colleagues
summary_full: Latvian parliamentarians may not always be skilled in the debating chamber but they proved themselves skilled on the basketball court on April 11th, winning first place in the Baltic Assembly Travelling Cup, defeating the Lithuanian Seimas and Estonian Rīgikogu teams.
